title: Bee RePixeled:FA
description: Fresh Animations version of Bee RePixeled which makes the bee more fluffy and the textures a bit more detailed, inspired by a minecraft movie
body:
This pack makes the bee more fluffy and the textures are a bit more detailed, inspired by a minecraft movie 
**This is a Fresh Animations version of:[Bee RePixeled](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/repixeledbee)**

**EMF and ETF are required for this pack**

![EMF and ETF required](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f4486e19d2a9bbfc3f94b3d1e936cc23b1a5df6.png)
